units.content: groups of (target, property) records that contain at least two records from distinct computational measurers with distinct method identifiers
among those groups, which contain at least one physical-interaction record and which do not
each such group as confirmed, refuted, or untested based on agreement of computational records with physical-interaction records when present
a decay-weighted per-measurer trust weight derived from prior refuted classifications attributed to each measurer, using the event log
each measurer's contribution to its own systemic classification is reduced by its trust weight
a feedback signal encoding the classifications and attenuated systemic labels is sent to the actor
